attr.title: Undivine
attr.desc: A dark metroidvania with RPG elements, "Undivine" challenges you to explore, battle, and uncover secrets in a desolate, interconnected world. Customize your abilities, wield unique weapons, and delve into deep lore filled with mystery.
attr.inst: Purchase the game on Steam and copy all game files into the assets folder. You can also use the free demo.
attr.inst_md: Purchase the game on [Steam](https://store.steampowered.com/app/3087910/Undivine/) and copy all game files into the `assets` folder. You can also use the `free demo`.
